title: About Me
paragraphs: I'm a software engineer with a passion for creating intelligent, user-focused applications. With over 5 years of experience in full-stack development and AI integration, I've helped businesses transform their operations through thoughtful technology solutions.

My journey into software development started with a fascination for problem-solving and has evolved into a career focused on building systems that make a real impact. I believe in writing clean, maintainable code and creating products that users genuinely enjoy.
I'm particularly interested in the intersection of AI and web development, where intelligent systems can be seamlessly integrated into everyday tools to enhance productivity and user experience.
